title: Stockholm Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Stockholm, with a Z-Score of -3.77. This event has a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Stockholm are extremely cold, with a high number of heating degree days (HDD) at 14.2 GG. 
 The humidity is at 70% and the wind speed is 5.0 km/h, contributing to the harsh conditions. 
 The city is experiencing a critical cold snap, with no cooling degree days (CDD) recorded at 0.0 GG.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
